22.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

22.gl: heat; figuratively, anger, poison (from its fever)
22.kj: anger, bottles, hot displeasure, furious(-ly, -ry), heat, indignation, poison, rage, wrath(-ful). See H2529 (חֶמְאָה).
brawling, contention(-ous), discord, strife. Compare H4079 (מִדְיָן), H4090 (מְדָן).

23.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it
23.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

23.gl: ruddy i.e. a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.)
23.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.

23.gl: to depress or sink (expectation figuratively, to humiliate, intransitive or transitive)
23.kj: abase, bring (cast, put) down, debase, humble (self), be (bring, lay, make, put) low(-er).

23.gl: to sustain; by implication, to obtain, keep fast; figuratively, to help, follow close
properly, weight, but only figuratively in a good sense, splendor or copiousness
arrogance or majesty; by implication, (concretely) ornament
23.kj: excellency, haughtiness, highness, pride, proudly, swelling.

24.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
24.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

24.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
24.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma

24.gl: properly, to front, i.e. stand boldly out opposite; by implication (causatively), to manifest; figuratively, to announce (always by word of mouth to one present); specifically, to expose, predict, explain, praise
24.kj: bewray, [idiom] certainly, certify, declare(-ing), denounce, expound, [idiom] fully, messenger, plainly, profess, rehearse, report, shew (forth), speak, [idiom] surely, tell, utter

24.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
24.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

24.gl: to be smooth (figuratively); by implication (as smooth stones were used for lots) to apportion or separate
24.kj: deal, distribute, divide, flatter, give, (have, im-) part(-ner), take away a portion, receive, separate self, (be) smooth(-er).

25.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
25.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

25.gl: figuratively, to trust, be confident or sure
25.kj: be bold (confident, secure, sure), careless (one, woman), put confidence, (make to) hope, (put, make to) trust.
25.dv: a primitive root; properly, to hide for refuge (but not so precipitately as H2620 (חָסָה));

25.gl: to be (causatively, make) lofty, especially inaccessible; by implication, safe, strong; used literally and figuratively
25.kj: defend, exalt, be excellent, (be, set on) high, lofty, be safe, set up (on high), be too strong.

25.gl: ruddy i.e. a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.)
25.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.

25.gl: a noose (for catching animals) (literally or figuratively); by implication, a hook (for the nose)
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
25.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

26.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
26.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
26.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

26.gl: properly, a verdict (favorable or unfavorable) pronounced judicially, especially a sentence or formal decree (human or (participant's) divine law, individual or collective), including the act, the place, the suit, the cr
26.kj: [phrase] adversary, ceremony, charge, [idiom] crime, custom, desert, determination, discretion, disposing, due, fashion, form, to be judged, judgment, just(-ice, -ly), (manner of)

26.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
26.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
26.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

26.gl: abundant (in quantity, size, age, number, rank, quality)
26.kj: (in) abound(-undance, -ant, -antly), captain, elder, enough, exceedingly, full, great(-ly, man, one), increase, long (enough, (time)), (do, have) many(-ifold, things, a time), (shi

26.gl: to search out (by any method, specifically in worship or prayer); by implication, to strive after
26.kj: ask, beg, beseech, desire, enquire, get, make inquisition, procure, (make) request, require, seek (for).

26.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
26.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

27.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
27.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
27.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

27.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
27.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

27.gl: properly, something disgusting (morally), i.e. (as noun) an abhorrence; especially idolatry or (concretely) an idol
27.dv: or תֹּעֵבַה; feminine active participle of H8581 (תַּעָב);

27.kj: convenient, equity, Jasher, just, meet(-est), [phrase] pleased well right(-eous), straight, (most) upright(-ly, -ness).

27.dv: or עָוֶל; and (feminine) עַוְלָה; or עוֹלָה; or עֹלָה; from H5765 (עֲוַל);

27.gl: morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person
27.kj: [phrase] condemned, guilty, ungodly, wicked (man), that did wrong.
